install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y python3-pip xvfb ffmpeg git build-essential python-opengl patchelf libgl1-mesa-glx libglew-dev libosmesa6-dev libglfw3 && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y swig && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
